role: Context injector — keeps memory.db fed with real-world context from Shane's life and system
data_sources: Weaviate LegacyKnowledge (category=voice-dump for Shane's voice transcripts)
rules: Pull 3 recent DailyNote entries per tick and summarize them into memory.db (category=context)
Pull 5 recent voice dumps from LegacyKnowledge and inject as Shane context (category=voice)
Summarize current bot health from bot_status.json and store as system context (category=system)
Do not duplicate — check memory.db for existing entries with same source+date before inserting
